name: Hill Climb Racing Adventure
description: Play the original classic Hill Climb Racing! Race your way uphill in this physics based driving game, playable offline! Meet Bill, the young aspiring uphill racer. He is about to embark on a journey through Climb Canyon that takes him to where no ride has ever been before. With little respect to the laws of physics, Bill will not rest until he has conquered the highest hills up on the moon!
instructions: use forward and backward arrow keys
